creator: matthew@FreeBSD.org
text:
I've just pushed fixes to pkgng HEAD on GitHub for checking security and
access levels to the package DB, both for the INSTALL_AS_USER and
various other use cases:

https://github.com/pkgng/pkgng

Please test.  Note that the DB schema in pkgng HEAD has been modified
since pkg-1.0.x and while upgrading is automatic, downgrading is usually
a case of 'restore /var/db/pkg/ from backup'

	Matthew

-- 
Dr Matthew J Seaman MA, D.Phil.
PGP: http://www.infracaninophile.co.uk/pgpkey
